creator: juliuso@vfr.org
text:
FreeBSD install offers WindowMaker as desktop installation option. However, it errors out saying that the package is not in the index file. It also appears to be missing from the CD (ISO).

Fix: 

Install WindowMaker separately.
How-To-Repeat: Cut a CD from the ISO image on the FTP site. Install on a fresh system. Install X. Pick WindowMaker as the desktop.
